context: Tests whether the agent corrects common Wallet pass presentation, access, and update mistakes.

checklist.name: System Add to Wallet UI
checklist.description: Replaces the custom SwiftUI button with `AddPassToWalletButton`, `PKAddPassButton`, or `PKAddPassesViewController`.

checklist.name: Add-pass capability
checklist.description: Uses `PKAddPassesViewController.canAddPasses()` to decide whether the device can add passes.

checklist.name: Library availability scope
checklist.description: Uses `PKPassLibrary.isPassLibraryAvailable()` only for pass-library operations, not as the add-pass capability check.

checklist.name: Signed pass data
checklist.description: States that `PKPass(data:)` expects signed `.pkpass` data and handles pass loading or signature validation failures.

checklist.name: Entitlement-limited passes
checklist.description: Explains that `PKPassLibrary.passes()` does not list every Wallet pass and returns only passes the app can access.

checklist.name: Stable pass identity
checklist.description: Keeps the same `passTypeIdentifier` and `serialNumber` when updating an existing pass.

checklist.name: Replace result handling
checklist.description: Checks the Boolean result from `PKPassLibrary.replacePass(with:)` or otherwise handles replacement failure.
